UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile information, acting as the central identity for customers, employees, and administrators.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity. (Primary Key)

name.description: The full name of the user.

role.description: The role of the user within the application.

state.description: The US state or region associated with the user (e.g., 'TX', 'PR').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

profilePhoto.description: URL to the user's profile photo stored in Firebase Cloud Storage.

EmployeeProfile.title: EmployeeProfile
EmployeeProfile.description: Details specific to an employee, linked to a UserProfile.

id.description: Unique identifier for the EmployeeProfile entity, same as the user's ID. (Primary Key)

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity's ID. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N EmployeeProfile)

employeeId.description: A unique identifier assigned to the employee.

state.description: The state where the employee primarily works (e.g., 'TX').

region.description: The specific region or territory assigned to the employee.

hireDate.description: The date when the employee was hired.

status.description: The current employment status of the employee.

onboardingStep.description: The current step in the onboarding process.

assignedJobIds.description: An array of IDs for jobs currently assigned to this employee. (Relationship: EmployeeProfile N:N Job)

availability.description: An object where keys are date strings (YYYY-MM-DD) and values are booleans indicating employee availability for that day. This represents the employee's working availability.

Job.title: Job
Job.description: Details of a specific moving job, including customer, assigned employees, and move logistics.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Job entity. (Primary Key)

customerId.description: Reference to the UserProfile ID of the customer who booked the job. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Job)

employeeIds.description: An array of UserProfile IDs for employees assigned to this job. (Relationship: Job N:N EmployeeProfile)

state.description: The state where the job primarily takes place.

status.description: The current status of the job.

moveDate.description: The scheduled date for the move.

pickupAddress.description: The full address for the pickup location.

dropoffAddress.description: The full address for the dropoff location.

moveSize.description: The estimated size of the move.

specialItems.description: Description of any special items requiring specific handling.

estimatedHours.description: The estimated number of hours to complete the job.

price.description: The agreed-upon price for the moving service.

notes.description: Internal notes related to the job.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the job was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the job.

Quote.title: Quote
Quote.description: Represents a moving quote requested by a customer.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Quote entity. (Primary Key)

customerId.description: Reference to the UserProfile ID of the customer requesting the quote. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Quote)

status.description: The current status of the quote.

details.description: A map containing detailed information about the quote, such as move specifics, special requests, and pricing breakdowns.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the quote was submitted.

JobApplication.title: JobApplication
JobApplication.description: Stores information for job applications submitted through the careers portal.

id.description: Unique identifier for the JobApplication entity. (Primary Key)

name.description: The full name of the applicant.

state.description: The state where the applicant is seeking employment.

experience.description: Details about the applicant's work experience.

resume.description: URL to the applicant's resume document stored in Firebase Cloud Storage.

status.description: The current status of the job application.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the application was submitted.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication User ID (UID).

definition.description: Contains details specific to an employee.

params.name: employeeUid
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication User ID (UID).
